findings.title: Default TAdapter differs from proposal
findings.detail: The proposal states 'Default TAdapter = Record<string, never> (empty adapter) preserves backward compatibility', but the implementation uses Record<string, unknown>. The code comment explains why (JsonMap has unknown index signature, making Record<string, never> incompatible), and the runstate-adapter-extension spec scenario says 'RunState<Record<string, never>> is assignable to the current RunState interface' — which still holds since the default is a supertype. The deviation is justified by the comment and does not break backward compatibility, but the proposal text should be updated to match.

findings.title: Compile-time-only tests have no runtime assertions
findings.detail: The RunState generic tests verify type-level correctness by compiling, but the test bodies contain no runtime assertions (assert.*). This is acceptable for type-level tests, but adding a trivial assertion (e.g., assert.ok(true)) in each test body would make test runners report them as explicitly passing rather than vacuously passing.

findings.title: Test files are untracked, not in the diff
findings.detail: The two new test files (resolve-run-id.test.ts, runstate-generic.test.ts) are untracked per git status but not included in the staged diff. They should be staged and committed together with the implementation changes to ensure CI runs them.
